imageMessage.caption: A political storm has erupted in the Coast region following allegations of nepotism and political patronage in the Kenya Ports Authority's recent recruitment exercise at the Port of Mombasa. https://nation.africa/kenya/business/kpa-jobs-row-coast-politics-of-public-service-recruitment-5498110#story

A student's attempt to overturn a decision by Jomo Kenyatta University of Agriculture and Technology to expel her and revoke her Master of Science degree has failed after the High Court upheld the university's disciplinary process. https://nation.africa/kenya/news/education/jkuat-student-loses-bid-to-overturn-expulsion-reinstate-degree-5498116#story

JUNE 25 anniversary: Coalition of Victims and Survivors Against State Violence (CVSSV) announces it will hold vigils, demonstrations every Sunday across the country in remembrance of victims of 2024 protests.

A year ago, Debra had no idea music was in her blood when she first experienced Kisau Girls High School band’s rendition of the benga masterpiece ‘Stella’ by Orchestra Muema Brothers on social media. 

She recalls being thrilled and spending months dreaming of joining the national school in Makueni County, at least to enjoy the music. https://nation.africa/kenya/life-and-style/art-books/kisau-girls-band-strums-its-way-to-fame--5498178#story

Political rallies are increasingly becoming lucrative hunting grounds for organised criminal gangs, with politicians, VIPs and campaign teams emerging as the latest targets. https://nation.africa/kenya/news/vips-under-siege-inside-the-gangs-turning-political-rallies-into-robbery-zones-5498260#story

For more than eight decades, Nyali School in Mombasa stood as a symbol of academic excellence in the Coast region.

For many parents, securing a place at the prestigious institution was both a mark of status and an investment in a child’s future. Today, however, the once-thriving school finds itself fighting for survival.
https://nation.africa/kenya/counties/mombasa/the-rise-fall-and-uncertain-future-of-nyali-school-5498134#story

extendedTextMessage.text:
💔 THE CHEATING GIRLFRIEND – EPISODE 1 💔

I never thought I would be the guy sharing this story. 😔

For three years, I loved her with all my heart. ❤️ I trusted her, respected her, and believed she was the woman I would spend the rest of my life with. Every morning, she was the first person I texted. Every night, she was the last person I thought about before sleeping. 🥰

Her name was Anita.

She was beautiful, caring, and always knew how to make me smile. 😊 Whenever my friends warned me about relationships, I would laugh and tell them, "Not Anita. She's different." 🤞❤️

One Friday evening, I finished work earlier than usual. I decided to surprise her with flowers and her favorite chocolate. 🌹🍫

I called her.

📞 No answer.

I called again.

📞 No answer.

A few minutes later, she texted:

💬 "Baby, I'm with my cousin. I'll call you later."

I smiled and replied:

💬 "Okay love, enjoy your time." ❤️

But something felt strange. 🤔

Not because she was with her cousin. No.

It was because just two days earlier, she had told me her cousin had traveled to another city. 😳

I tried to ignore the feeling.

You know how love is... sometimes it makes us blind. 😔

That night, I couldn't sleep. I kept looking at my phone, waiting for her call. 📱

11 PM... ⏰

12 AM... ⏰

1 AM... ⏰

Nothing.

The next morning, she finally called.

📞 "Sorry babe, I fell asleep."

Her voice sounded nervous.

I wanted to ask questions, but I didn't want to seem insecure. So I let it go. 😞

A week later, something happened that changed everything...

I was sitting at a café with my friend Kevin. ☕👬

As we talked, Kevin suddenly became quiet.

He stared at his phone.

Then he looked at me.

Then back at his phone.

His face had completely changed. 😳

💬 "Bro... there's something you need to see."

I laughed.

💬 "Why are you looking so serious?"

Kevin slowly pushed his phone across the table.

The moment I looked at the screen...

My heart stopped. 💔😢

What I saw was a photo of Anita.

But she wasn't alone...

😳😳😳

TO BE CONTINUED...

🔥 Episode 2 drops soon! Don't miss it.
